title: Pickable Me
description: A modpack created for my friends who are certainly NOT playing Runescape
body:
Ever wanted to feel like Gru, but instead of stealing the moon you’re hoarding 200 Minecraft mods? Congratulations: you’ve found the pack. Pickable Me is a chaotic collection that lets you and your “minions” (friends) dive into tech, magic, exploration, and enough random nonsense to make an Old School RuneScape questline look straightforward.

**What it does:**

Tech Mods: Build contraptions that would make Niles from OSRS weep, or at least wonder why you need 14 different types of power cables.

Magic Mods: Cast spells, brew potions, and generally roleplay as a level 99 Wizard who accidentally clicked “attack guard.”

Exploration Mods: New biomes, dungeons, and bosses—think of it like going from Lumbridge straight into the Wilderness.

QoL Tweaks: Because without them, you’d ragequit faster than a minion trying to chop a magic tree with 1 Woodcutting.

**Why you’d want it:**

You’re Gru, your friends are the minions, and together you’re pulling off the ultimate heist: stealing all the fun mods at once.

Perfect for groups who can’t decide between grinding XP, exploring, or building ridiculous lairs.

If vanilla Minecraft is bronze armor, Pickable Me is full dragon gear (with a questionable smithing level requirement).

**Important info before you download:**

Bring RAM. Lots of RAM. (8–10GB recommended, unless you enjoy 0.5 FPS boss fights.)

Designed for both singleplayer and multiplayer—though it’s best enjoyed with your loyal, banana-loving squad.

**_Some bugs and jank may occur. Think of them as “side quests.”_**
